headline: Why KLA Corporation (KLAC) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of semiconductor manufacturing equipment maker KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) jumped 6.6% in the afternoon session after Micron's blowout day signaled that AI-driven chip demand is structurally undersupplied which is bullish news for the equipment makers and foundries that build the capacity.
